summary: Frontend regression smoke for FileManager refactor (1534 → 1385 lines, sub-components extracted to /file-manager/). Source-inspection of all 5 new files (Toolbar.jsx, BulkBar.jsx, DragOverlay.jsx, ImagePreviewModal.jsx, useHotkeys.js) confirms data-testids preserved, props wired correctly, and FileManager.js imports + uses each. Live Playwright E2E (goldtest/123456 on https://readme-deploy-2.preview.emergentagent.com/panel) verified login → dashboard → Files tab → toolbar testids → '/' shortcut → Esc cascade → V2 coral theme. All assertions passed; zero JS page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: each sub-component is a pure render with explicit prop contract, all data-testids relocated correctly, and FileManager.js wiring matches prop signatures.
useHotkeys deps array is comprehensive — includes every state setter/value referenced inside the listener, so no stale-closure risk.

BulkBar early-returns null when count<=0 (correct gating). ImagePreviewModal early-returns null when preview is null. DragOverlay always renders when mounted (parent FileManager.js gates with `{isDragging && <DragOverlay …/>}` at line 734) — correct.
Toolbar.jsx upload-folder input keeps `webkitdirectory="" directory="" mozdirectory=""` attributes, preserving the iteration_10 folder-upload flow contract.

Minor: Toolbar.jsx breadcrumb uses array index `i` as React key inside slice(1).map — acceptable here because path segments rarely reorder, but if a user enters a folder named the same as a sibling, key collision could theoretically warn. Not a regression — matches pre-refactor behavior.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded goldtest account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified safe. Sub-components live at /app/frontend/src/components/panel/file-manager/. WHM is CPANEL_DOWN so file-list / BulkBar / ImagePreviewModal cannot be exercised against real files in this environment — gating behavior was validated via DOM-count assertions (count=0 when not active) plus source review. iteration_10 already covered the live BulkBar/ImagePreview/folder-upload flows when WHM was up.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Pure refactor with no regressions detected.
